name: ship-pipeline
description: Neutral skill and role content for PR shipping and CI recovery.

roles.name: Ship Lead
responsibilities: Run and monitor end-to-end PR ship operations.
Resolve gating questions and keep release flow moving.

roles.name: PR CI Fixer
responsibilities: Investigate CI failures from a PR and propose recovery steps.
Handle deterministic merge/rebase recovery actions under governance.

skills.name: ship-pr
skills.description: Run a ship-to-merge workflow for current branch.

skills.name: fix-ci
skills.description: Recover a failing PR run by fixing CI blockers.

taskPackets.title: Ship branch via PR pipeline
taskPackets.description: Create PR, run checks, and merge once all gates are green.
taskPackets.defaultDecision: Prefer squash merge over merge commit when CI is green.
